scroll_found.title: Research the Vine Brew scroll at a Research Pedestal

subtitle.text: 26 wines. One heals fully. Find it before the Nether.

description: CH.04 · THE VINE BREW
▸ Vinery adds 26 unique wines.
Each one has different saturation, effects, and lore.
One of them is different from all the rest.
◈ VINERY OVERVIEW
└ Grapes: found in temperate biomes,
cultivated on trellis blocks
└ Pressing: grape stomping box → grape juice
└ Fermentation: juice locked in barrel over time
different varieties ferment to different wines
└ Aging: longer barrel time = better quality
└ Juice → Wine is time-gated, not craft-gated
◈ ★ EISWEIN
└ Crafted from ice-frozen grapes
└ ▲ FULLY RESTORES HEALTH on consumption
└ Rare — requires specific conditions
└ Ch06 Nether prep: bring several bottles
└ The scroll says: 'the coldest winter made the best wine'
◈ SCROLL: The Vine Brew
└ Found in: vineyard ruins, wine cellar chests,
old manor basements, winery loot tables
└ Research time: 20 min
└ Unlocks: all 26 Vinery wines, Eiswein recipe knowledge
▸ The winery was one of the first things they built.
Then the wall. Then the road.
The wine was still there when the road crumbled.
▶ Find The Vine Brew scroll [check]
▶ Brew 4 bottles of wine
◇ Nether Vinery (Ch06) adds nether-fruit wines.
Different flavors. Same system.
Magma Gelatin (Nether's Delight) is better than
wine for fire immunity — but wine tastes better.
